title: Database Schema
purpose: Provides live database structure as context for AI.

configFields.description: Which provider to load: auto (primary), mongodb, prisma, or all.
all = include all collections; selected = include only `collections`.
Collection names to include when mode is selected.
Include field lists for each collection.
Include inferred relations/foreign key hints when available.
json emits a JSON object; text emits a compact schema text for prompting.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.

semanticNodeExample.title: Database Schema
